meta.shape: 8 seeds x 3 representative orders x 6 interventions = 144 runs

riskSemantics.detectedOverclaimFindings: DETECTION metric: findings discovered by audit coverage, not actual generated risk.
riskSemantics.latentRiskEstimate: EXPOSURE metric: estimated hidden risk used for risk comparison.
riskSemantics.evidenceIntegrityDelta: OUTCOME metric represented here as evidence strength minus claim level.
riskSemantics.auditCoverageRate: Derived deterministic structural coverage proxy for intervention comparison.

interventions.label: Baseline hierarchical
interventions.description: Unmodified G27 hierarchical scenario runner output.
interventions.expectedPrimaryEffect: Reference point for same seed and representative order.

interventions.label: Merge judgment plus
interventions.description: Deterministically models stronger lead merge/select judgment.
interventions.expectedPrimaryEffect: Higher final quality and evidence at modest coordination cost.

interventions.label: Handoff clarity plus
interventions.description: Deterministically models clearer handoffs and summaries.
interventions.expectedPrimaryEffect: Lower coordination cost and delivery ticks.

interventions.label: Tighter span of control
interventions.description: Deterministically models narrower lead attention and stricter review.
interventions.expectedPrimaryEffect: Lower latent risk with higher coordination overhead.

interventions.label: Extra worker
interventions.description: Deterministically models one additional worker assigned to the order.
interventions.expectedPrimaryEffect: More throughput and artifacts with some parallel waste.

interventions.label: Audit coverage plus
interventions.description: Deterministically models stronger audit coverage without using Ollama.
interventions.expectedPrimaryEffect: More detected findings and lower latent risk exposure.

runs.effectNote: baseline hierarchical run from G27 organization runner
merge_plus improves final artifact selection quality through stronger lead merge judgment
handoff_plus reduces coordination overhead through clearer handoffs
span_control_tight trades speed for lower latent risk through narrower review attention
extra_worker improves throughput for medium/complex orders but increases parallel waste
audit_coverage_plus may increase detected findings while reducing latent risk exposure
